replies.author: @jenx5870
replies.text: ​@nicoleackerman205Anyone can make films about Bond once he becomes public domain. They have to remain true to his character (as written by the creator) when creating new works. For example, any new works cannot have him suddenly become a serial killer or give women the Bill Cosby treatment. That goes against his known characteristics. He is a charming hero, so he would have to stay that way, albeit maybe with some human flaws added. There might be some things copyrighted still, like certain inventions used in the films, his car, etc. In 9 to 10 years, there will be at least a few new iterations of James Bond. I grew up loving the series. I write. I may have to give a go at a faithful representation of him.
